items.title: Impact is described, not quantified
items.from_resume: Responsible for developing and maintaining features for the web app using React and Node.js.
items.why_it_matters: Metrics increase interview chances ~40%; make impact concrete and credible.
items.how_we_fix_it: Insert truthful metrics or scope (use approximations honestly if needed).

items.title: Unclear candidate name
items.why_it_matters: Recruiters and ATS need to immediately know who the document belongs to. Unclear or missing name makes the resume unusable.
items.how_we_fix_it: Put your legal full name in large bold text at the very top.

items.title: Primary role title missing
items.from_resume: sdf sdf — sdf sdf (f sdf sdf)
items.why_it_matters: The headline is the highest-weight keyword line. A generic or missing title under-ranks you and hides your actual expertise.
items.how_we_fix_it: Use a specific title that reflects your actual work (e.g. 'Senior Platform Engineer' instead of 'Software Engineer').

items.title: No professional experience dates
items.from_resume: Experience sdf sdf — sdf sdf (f sdf sdf)
items.why_it_matters: Dates establish duration and recency of experience. Missing dates make it impossible to evaluate career progression and tenure.
items.how_we_fix_it: Format as: 'Company — Role | Jan 2022 – Mar 2024' or 'Present' for current.
items.suggested_rewrite: Acme Corp — Senior Platform Engineer | Jan 2022 – Present

items.title: Bullets lack CAR structure (Challenge-Action-Result)
items.from_resume: Worked on the new dashboard feature and fixed some bugs in the backend.
items.why_it_matters: Proves problem-solving and value over duties.
items.suggested_rewrite: Faced stagnant pipeline. Redesigned process. Increased revenue 42%.

items.title: Complex layout breaks ATS parsing
items.from_resume: Used \begin{tabular} and multicol for the layout with side info.
items.why_it_matters: 98%+ large employers use ATS that parse poorly on complex designs; 97% compliance needed.
items.how_we_fix_it: Convert to clean single column, standard fonts (Arial etc.), text-selectable PDF or .docx.
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.

items.title: No dedicated skills section or skills buried
items.from_resume: React, Node, AWS (buried in bullets, no dedicated section)
items.why_it_matters: 70-85% employers use skills-based hiring; ATS prioritizes skills over titles.
items.how_we_fix_it: List technical/tools first, then transferable. Mirror JD language naturally.
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.

items.title: Bullets too long and hard to scan
items.from_resume: Responsible for the full lifecycle of the payment service including design, implementation, testing with Jest, deployment via Kubernetes, monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana, and on-call support for production incidents across three regions.
items.why_it_matters: Recruiters scan quickly (6-8s). Dense long bullets get ignored. Short, punchy bullets with impact at the start maximize attention and readability for both humans and AI parsers.
items.how_we_fix_it: Target 15-30 words. Cut filler. One idea per bullet. Example: split a long duty list into focused impact statements.
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.

items.title: Weak or missing professional summary
items.from_resume: Software engineer with experience in full-stack development seeking new opportunities in a dynamic team.
items.why_it_matters: First thing read after ATS; sets the narrative and grabs attention immediately.
items.how_we_fix_it: Rewrite as a tight 1-2 sentence paragraph naming the role, key strengths, and strongest impact. Keep it short, not bulleted.
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.

items.title: Projects section missing or weak
items.from_resume: Built a todo app with React and Firebase (no metrics or links).
items.why_it_matters: Hiring managers in tech often spend more time on GitHub/portfolio than text claims. Quality projects prove ability to ship, solve problems, and use relevant tech. 3-6 best > dozens mediocre.
items.how_we_fix_it: Create 'Projects' after Experience or Skills. For each: Title | Brief (problem + your role). Bullets: [Impact metric]. Tech: X, Y. Link: github.com/...
items.suggested_rewrite: E-commerce Recommender | Built collaborative filtering model improving click-through 18%. Tech: Python, scikit-learn, FastAPI. github.com/you/reco-demo

items.title: Keywords are stuffed or missing in context
items.from_resume: Used modern web technologies to build scalable applications for enterprise clients.
items.why_it_matters: Modern AI/ATS uses semantic/contextual matching, not just exact keywords. Stuffing hurts.
items.how_we_fix_it: Extract key phrases from JD and weave them authentically into relevant sections.
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.

items.title: Header missing essential contact info
items.from_resume: Name: John | Email: john@personal.com | Phone: 555-1234 | Address: 123 Main St, Anytown
items.why_it_matters: Clean header maximizes top-third scan real estate (critical for 7s F-pattern). Extra personal data adds clutter or bias risk; recruiters want quick contact + professional proof points.
items.how_we_fix_it: First line: NAME (larger/bold). Second: phone | email | linkedin | github | City, ST or Remote
items.suggested_rewrite: Improved version here with metrics and clarity.
